fact: Alex's full name is Alex Morgan. Digitally, they are known as alexdev.
Alex is a Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience in web development.
To contact Alex, reach them at alex@example.com or on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/alexdev. Their GitHub is github.com/alexdev.
Alex currently works at Example Corp as a Senior Software Engineer, leading the payments platform team.
Alex's career timeline: StartupXYZ (2018-2020) as Junior Developer, WebAgency (2020-2022) as Full-stack Developer, Example Corp (2022-present) as Senior Software Engineer.
Alex's primary tech stack includes TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Docker.
Alex specializes in payment systems, API design, and frontend performance optimization.
Alex created OpenBudget, an open-source personal finance tracker with over 2,000 GitHub stars.
Alex holds the AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification and a Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) certification.
Alex holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from State University, completed in 2018.
Outside of work, Alex enjoys rock climbing, photography, and contributing to open-source projects.

Alex Morgan is a Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience, specializing in payment systems and API design. They lead the payments platform team at Example Corp, maintain the popular OpenBudget open-source project, and hold AWS and Kubernetes certifications. Outside work they enjoy rock climbing and photography.
